company.description: Online accounting and tax filing service that assists small businesses with compliance duties, including company accounts, tax returns, VAT, bookkeeping, and payroll services.

business_model.pricing_model: Fixed-fee pricing (e.g., £399 for Company Accounts & Tax Return, £80 for Dormant Company Accounts)

news.title: Busting myths around online accounting
news.summary: Debitam addresses common misconceptions about online accounting, including security concerns and cost-effectiveness.

ai_insights.summary: Debitam is a growing online accounting service provider with a strong market position in the UK small business sector. The company shows healthy financials with £11.33M in revenue and positive cash flow. They have a strong online presence and excellent customer reviews, indicating good business health and customer satisfaction.
